parameters: 一括セルフスイッチ操作

Huff...! Th-this is pretty tough... The rocks are hard, so it's not going well at
all........
Let's take a break soon... We should meet up with the other two.
一括セルフスイッチ操作
Phew... I think I've made up for oversleeping. I'll call it a day for now...

\SE[default]Haaah, I'm so tired~...... Hey...\n[1]...... How about you...? I'm doing great──── \.
Whoa...!\SE[9]

Oh, Dario... Good work. I've made quite a bit of progress today too... But the end
still seems far off.
\SE[7]\n[1]... You've already gotten this far...!? ...I-I'm still......

...Y-you cheated somehow, didn't you!? There's no way you could dig this fast
otherwise...! That's it! You're using better tools than me, aren't you...!?

Huh? No, I'm just using the ones that were lying around... I think they're probably
the same as yours.
\SE[5]Haaah, is that so...... Man, this is starting to feel stupid......

What was that about, Dario...? Well, I'll finish up for today too. Let's go eat
Elly's cooking...
一括セルフスイッチ操作
........ Phew, I think that's enough for today...

Maybe I'll call it a day. Like Dario said, I worked about as much as yesterday. He
can't complain about this...
一括セルフスイッチ操作

Hngh, heh...! Hup...! Hah...! I think I'm starting to get the hang of it...! At this
rate, I might finish by the end of the day...!

I can already see the path leading deeper from here... If I can just reach that
spot...! Alright, I'll give it my all...! Hiyah!
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true

...What the!? The ground, it's shaking...!? An, an earthquake...!? Th-that's bad! The
ceiling is collapsing...!
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = Ch2_Last_13
I can't go home without finishing my work...
\SE[4]Hey, \n[1], this place is a resting room. Let's check it out first.
Yeah, let's go take a look.
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true
The path splits in two here. So, which one leads to the magic stone deposit...
Magic stones...? I feel like I've heard that somewhere...

\SE[5]What's with you? You're an adventurer and you don't even know that? Uh, well... Magic
stones are rocks that contain a lot of magical power... You know, the ones used in
street lamps and stuff.
Huh, so that's what those are.

\SE[2]Well, they ain't much use to an uneducated guy like you. Seems they're pretty
valuable and trade for a high price. And apparently, you can mine 'em here.
I see... That's a hopeful story. To have such a resource near this village...

\SE[6]\SM[attack]Hey hey \n[1], that's where you're supposed to get excited!? In other words! If we find
'em, we can make a killing!?

Huh? But this land belongs to the lord, doesn't it...? Even if we find magic stones,
they wouldn't be ours, right?

\SE[1]Heh... I know that... But hey, we can sneak a little bit and no one'll notice...!
Besides, having that kind of reward would give us more motivation for the tough work,
right?

\SE[2]So anyway, if you find any magic stones, let me know. If you do, I'll forget about
the money you owe me for the drinks the other day! Alright, I'm countin' on you! \n[1]!
skit moveOut ダリオ f 12 left linear

...I went to the trouble of getting the money to pay him back. Well, if he's gonna
forget about it, I guess that's fine...
Alright, I'd better get to work too!
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = Ch2_Last_Day1
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = Ch2_Last_Day1

\SE[2]Whoaah! Wait for me, my money!! Once I find it, I'll sell it off in the Royal City...
and then I'll blow it all playing at the brothel! Gahaha...!
skit fadeIn ダリオ t right 20

Whew...phew...... Huh, what's up \n[1]! Just now showing up for work!? I started my
shift ages ago!
Yeah, sorry I'm late. I'll work hard to make up for lost time.

\SE[6]Sheesh, get it together...! My magic stone is waiting for me deep in this mine...!
Gotta get it in my pocket soon! Gahaha!\SE[1]
Haha...! Yeah, I'll do my best!

\SE[6]Hmph, but...this is exhausting...! Tilling the soil is still better than
this...h-heh...!

\SE[9]Hah...huff...! I-I can't...go on anymore...! I can't...do any more... I can't move
another step...
Are you okay, Dario? You look pretty exhausted...

\SE[1]Oh...\n[1]... Check it out, my progress...! I dug through half of that huge rock...!
Pretty awesome, right...?

Yeah, good work, Dario. Maybe that's enough for today? It's not good to push yourself
too hard on the first day.
\SE[5]O-oh... Heh, yeah... I'll call it a day for now...
Go on ahead... I'm gonna rest here a bit... ...zzz...
\SE[4]H-hey, go on ahead... I'm gonna rest here for a bit... ... ... Zzz...

Dario, don't sleep in a place like this...!? Elly went to the trouble of cleaning the
futon and is waiting for you!

\SE[6]Haaah... This is such a pain... Huh? What's up, \n[1]? You're late again today, you got
any motivation or what?
U-uh... sorry. I'll work hard from now on, so please forgive me?

\SE[7]Heh... Well, from now on, work without any breaks. I started early this morning, so
I'm gonna head out first...! You better work properly! Until the same time as
yesterday, got it!?
\SE[6]...Haa, I'm so bored... I've got no motivation at all...

Dario, we made more progress today than yesterday...I think? I need to work hard
too...

...? It feels like we haven't made any progress since yesterday...? Dario, you really
did it, right...?

I wish Dario would try a little harder... Oh, no, no... He's doing his best too... I
shouldn't blame him...
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = DalioWall
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = DalioWall
What are you doing crouched down here like that? Are you feeling sick or something?

\SE[11]N-no, nothing at all! It's just that, um... that magic stone thing? I was just
wondering if maybe there were any buried around here or something...
You were looking for it for me? Thanks.
\SE[10]No, no... But, yeah, I still can't find it~... Haha...!

\SE[11]Ah! That's right...! I have some business in the village! I'm just going to head out
for a bit, onii-chan! See ya!
Huh, Elly!? She's gone... Why was she in such a hurry...?

...Somehow, around here... It's not just the smell of dust, it's like there's some
strange odor... Maybe I'm just imagining it...?

? What's this smell... \.\COM[exc]What!? There's dried cum stuck here... Dario, what the
hell were you doing next to your sister...!

To think he was jerking off in a place like this with nothing around... Dario, your
sex drive is way too strong... Hah... If Elly saw this, she'd definitely make a huge
fuss........
